action.message: Run the daily SEO workflow: 1) Fetch http://localhost/rezervuary-rgs-50/ using web_fetch and extract the product content (title, description, specs, applications). 2) Write an SEO-optimized article in Russian 300-400 words with keywords: резервуар РГС-50, горизонтальный стальной резервуар, ёмкость 50 м³. Include phone 8 (800) 250-63-35 as CTA. 3) Use web_fetch to POST the article to http://localhost/wp-json/wp/v2/posts with Authorization: Basic c2VvYWRtaW46ZGtaUE1nc3JXaWZacFZjRmNOaklhREFO, Content-Type: application/json, body: {title, content, status: publish, excerpt}. 4) After successful publish, send Telegram notification to chat 283500912 via bot 8591048587:AAElSAdCnxpHja3ujJpTQzp5HQBPw9BHVvw with the post URL. Return the published post URL.
